summary: Full e2e testing of Cornelia Trompke Consulting & Coaching marketing website. Backend API (100%) and frontend UI (100%) all passing. All major features verified.

design_issues.screen: Work-with-me page (via internal navigation from home)
issues: Service links (exec/retreat/team/org) not found when navigating via page.click from previous page within 3.5s - needs 5s wait due to scroll reveal animations. Not a bug, just animation timing.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - should use lifespan context manager in FastAPI
All core features working correctly - no action required
seed_data_creation: Created test contact entries via POST /api/contact during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features work. Preloader takes ~2.5s but direct URL navigation to sub-pages needs 4-5s wait for content to render with scroll reveal animations. Backend contact form API fully working. Language switcher (EN/DE) works. Legal tabs (impressum/privacy/terms) work. Mobile hamburger menu works. All 4 service sub-pages load correctly. Contact form submission works end-to-end.
